message:
test(fcp-tailscale,fcp-graphql): expand tailscale and graphql test suites

fcp-tailscale: 292 → 383 (+91 tests) across error, tag, identity, client modules
fcp-graphql: 319 → 464 (+145 tests) across error, operation, retry, client, subscription, schema, pagination

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
